picks.quote: I think he's going to make it look pretty easy. I expect him to finish this fight probably in the first round.
I like Tatsuro to do what he does... I like Tatsuro Tybura to claim gold here and new.
I think he cashes as an underdog once again here. Give me Waldo Cortez Acosta.
I prefer to take the guy who looks like he's one takedown away from winning the fight... give me Sean Brady to win.
I don't know how you don't just lock button auto pick auto bet, whatever you want to call it, Jeremy Stephens at this number.
Amedee Gogo is going to knock this guy out. He's going to do it early.
I think Amosov is going to make it look easy this week.
I'll take the slightly younger man, the bigger athlete, the better wrestler... I think that Grant Dawson's going to be able to get to his back.
I think Jared Gordon's going to outwork him over three rounds and get his hand raised.
Give me the Brazilian to get it done. I think he ends up knocking this guy out.
I think we're going to see that this week when he takes William Gomis down and is able to just kind of control him and probably finish him
I think that Jose Ochoa's got a lot of options, and I think he finishes the fight.
